name: node-smart-buffer
title: node-smart-buffer
description:
smart-buffer improves nodejs Buffer functionality
smart-buffer is a Buffer wrapper that adds automatic read & write
offset tracking, string operations, data insertions, and more.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-smart-buffer because smart-buffer improves nodejs Buffer functionality.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-smart-buffer as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-smart-buffer with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-smart-buffer --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
